title: nassella lepida
intro: Nassella lepida, also known as purple needle grass, is a perennial bunchgrass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nassella lepida are attributed to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Nassella lepida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including colds, bronchitis, and skin conditions.
